outlook_paragraph: SM shows moderate drilling activity with 9 active sites at decision date, 1.5 above the regional baseline, driven by 2 newly active pads alongside 7 continuously active ones. With half of production tied to the Permian segment and a realized price at an 12% discount to WTI, revenue is supported by stable operational momentum. The deterministic forecast of $750.8M reflects this balanced activity and moderate commodity environment.
